svg.title: Project in Big Data Analytics: Spark and Big Data Analytics

text.data-narration: A project is a self-contained task that involves collecting, processing, and analyzing large datasets to extract insights and knowledge.

g.text: A project is a self-contained task that involves collecting, processing, and analyzing large datasets to extract insights and knowledge.

text.data-narration: A project typically involves defining a problem statement, collecting data, processing the data, and analyzing the results to draw conclusions and make recommendations.

g.text: A project typically involves defining a problem statement, collecting data, processing the data, and analyzing the results to draw conclusions and make recommendations.

text.data-narration: Research and Planning: Define the problem statement and objectives of the project. Conduct literature review and gather relevant data. Develop a preliminary plan and timeline.

g.text: Research and Planning: Define the problem statement and objectives of the project. Conduct literature review and gather relevant data. Develop a preliminary plan and timeline.

text.data-narration: Data Collection: Collect relevant and high-quality data. Clean and preprocess the data. Store the data in a suitable format.

g.text: Data Collection: Collect relevant and high-quality data. Clean and preprocess the data. Store the data in a suitable format.

text.data-narration: Define the deliverables that will be produced as a result of the project.

g.text: Define the deliverables that will be produced as a result of the project.
